methylTracer 0.99.8

  • Changelog

Simulate Single-Cell Bisulfite Sequencing (scBS) Data

Source: R/simulate_scBS_data.R
simulate_scBS_data.Rd
simulate_scBS_data(
  n_cells = 100L,
  n_sites = 1000000L,
  sparsity = 0.85,
  n_dmrs = 100L,
  dmr_width = 20L,
  group_ratio = 0.5,
  output_dir = tempdir(),
  output_format = c("cov", "bed"),
  mean_coverage = 10,
  background_meth = 0.5,
  dmr_meth_ctrl = 0.8,
  dmr_meth_treat = 0.2,
  seed = 12345L,
  verbose = TRUE
)

Arguments

n_cells

Integer. Number of cells to simulate (default: 100). Typically 50-1000 for testing, 5000+ for realistic scenarios.

n_sites

Integer. Total number of CpG sites in the "genome" (default: 1,000,000). Use 1M for testing, 28M for human genome scale.

sparsity

Numeric in 0, 1. Probability that a site has NO coverage in a cell (default: 0.85). Typical scBS: 0.80-0.95.

n_dmrs

Integer. Number of DMRs to implant (default: 100).

dmr_width

Integer. Width of each DMR in CpG sites (default: 20).

group_ratio

Numeric. Proportion of cells in control group (default: 0.5). E.g., 0.5 = 50\

output_dirCharacter. Directory to save individual cell files (default: tempdir()). Will be created if it doesn't exist.

output_formatCharacter. File format: "cov" (4-column coverage) or "bed" (6-column BED-like) (default: "cov").

mean_coverageNumeric. Mean sequencing depth per covered site (default: 10). Higher = more reads.

background_methNumeric in 0, 1. Baseline methylation level for non-DMR sites (default: 0.5).

dmr_meth_ctrlNumeric in 0, 1. Methylation level in DMRs for control group (default: 0.8).

dmr_meth_treatNumeric in 0, 1. Methylation level in DMRs for treatment group (default: 0.2).

seedInteger. Random seed for reproducibility (default: 12345).

verboseLogical. Print progress messages (default: TRUE).

A list with components:

metadata

data.frame with columns: cell_id, file_path, group, n_covered_sites, mean_coverage

dmr_regions

data.frame defining the implanted DMRs: chr, start, end, dmr_id, true_meth_ctrl, true_meth_treat

cpg_universe

data.frame of all CpG sites: chr, pos, site_id

output_dir

Path to directory containing simulated files

Generate synthetic single-cell bisulfite sequencing data with realistic sparsity patterns and implanted Differentially Methylated Regions (DMRs) for testing and benchmarking methylation analysis pipelines. This function simulates scBS data by:

  1. Creating a genomic "universe" of CpG sites

  2. Defining biological groups (Control vs. Treatment)

  3. Implanting DMRs with known methylation differences

  4. Adding realistic coverage sparsity (80-95\

  5. Writing individual cell files to disk

The simulation models key features of real scBS data:

  • High sparsity (most sites have no coverage in most cells)

  • Variable coverage depth (Poisson-distributed)

  • Binomial methylation counts

  • Group-specific DMRs for validation

Contents

Developed by Zetian Jia, Xiang Li.

Site built with pkgdown 2.2.0.
